results.query: Show revenue by customer
results.gold_sql: SELECT customers.name, SUM(orders.amount) AS revenue FROM orders JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.id GROUP BY customers.name
results.final_sql: SELECT customers.name, SUM(orders.amount) AS revenue FROM orders JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.id JOIN subscriptions ON customers.id = subscriptions.customer_id JOIN segment_members ON customers.id = segment_members.customer_id JOIN customer_segments ON segment_members.segment_id = customer_segments.id JOIN support_tickets ON customers.id = support_tickets.customer_id GROUP BY customers.name

results.query: Show revenue by region
results.gold_sql: SELECT regions.name, SUM(orders.amount) AS revenue FROM orders JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.id JOIN regions ON customers.region_id = regions.id GROUP BY regions.name
results.final_sql: SELECT regions.name, SUM(orders.amount) AS revenue FROM regions JOIN customers ON regions.id = customers.region_id JOIN orders ON customers.id = orders.customer_id JOIN warehouses ON regions.id = warehouses.region_id JOIN subscriptions ON customers.id = subscriptions.customer_id GROUP BY regions.name

results.query: Show revenue by product category
results.gold_sql: SELECT products.category, SUM(order_items.quantity * order_items.unit_price) AS revenue FROM orders JOIN order_items ON order_items.order_id = orders.id JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.id GROUP BY products.category
results.final_sql: SELECT products.category, SUM(order_items.quantity * order_items.unit_price) AS revenue FROM products JOIN subscriptions ON products.id = subscriptions.product_id JOIN inventory ON products.id = inventory.product_id JOIN order_items ON products.id = order_items.product_id JOIN orders ON order_items.order_id = orders.id JOIN invoice_lines ON products.id = invoice_lines.product_id GROUP BY products.category

results.query: Show revenue by supplier country
results.gold_sql: SELECT suppliers.country, SUM(order_items.quantity * order_items.unit_price) AS revenue FROM orders JOIN order_items ON order_items.order_id = orders.id JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.id JOIN suppliers ON products.supplier_id = suppliers.id GROUP BY suppliers.country
results.final_sql: SELECT suppliers.country, SUM(order_items.quantity * order_items.unit_price) AS revenue FROM suppliers JOIN products ON suppliers.id = products.supplier_id JOIN order_items ON products.id = order_items.product_id JOIN orders ON order_items.order_id = orders.id JOIN subscriptions ON products.id = subscriptions.product_id GROUP BY suppliers.country

results.query: Show late shipments by warehouse region
results.gold_sql: SELECT warehouses.name, regions.name, COUNT(shipments.id) AS shipments FROM shipments JOIN warehouses ON shipments.warehouse_id = warehouses.id JOIN regions ON warehouses.region_id = regions.id WHERE shipments.status = 'late' GROUP BY warehouses.name, regions.name
results.final_sql: SELECT warehouses.name, regions.name, COUNT(shipments.id) AS shipments FROM shipments JOIN warehouses ON shipments.warehouse_id = warehouses.id JOIN regions ON warehouses.region_id = regions.id WHERE shipments.status = 'late' GROUP BY warehouses.name, regions.name

results.query: Show revenue by sales rep
results.gold_sql: SELECT employees.name, SUM(orders.amount) AS revenue FROM orders JOIN employees ON orders.sales_rep_id = employees.id GROUP BY employees.name
results.final_sql: SELECT employees.name, SUM(orders.amount) AS revenue FROM orders JOIN employees ON orders.sales_rep_id = employees.id JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.id JOIN regions ON customers.region_id = regions.id GROUP BY employees.name

results.query: Show paid amount by payment method
results.gold_sql: SELECT payments.method, SUM(payments.amount) AS paid_amount FROM payments GROUP BY payments.method
results.final_sql: SELECT payments.method, SUM(payments.amount) AS paid_amount FROM payments JOIN orders ON payments.order_id = orders.id JOIN invoices ON orders.id = invoices.order_id JOIN invoice_lines ON invoices.id = invoice_lines.invoice_id GROUP BY payments.method

results.query: Show returned units by supplier
results.gold_sql: SELECT suppliers.name, SUM(returns.quantity) AS returned_units FROM returns JOIN order_items ON returns.order_item_id = order_items.id JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.id JOIN suppliers ON products.supplier_id = suppliers.id GROUP BY suppliers.name
results.final_sql: SELECT suppliers.name, SUM(returns.quantity) AS returned_units FROM returns JOIN order_items ON returns.order_item_id = order_items.id JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.id JOIN suppliers ON products.supplier_id = suppliers.id GROUP BY suppliers.name

results.query: Show available stock by warehouse and product category
results.gold_sql: SELECT warehouses.name, products.category, SUM(inventory.quantity_on_hand) AS stock FROM inventory JOIN warehouses ON inventory.warehouse_id = warehouses.id JOIN products ON inventory.product_id = products.id GROUP BY warehouses.name, products.category
results.final_sql: SELECT warehouses.name, products.category, SUM(inventory.quantity_on_hand) AS stock FROM inventory JOIN products ON inventory.product_id = products.id JOIN warehouses ON inventory.warehouse_id = warehouses.id GROUP BY warehouses.name, products.category

results.query: Show campaign revenue by marketing channel
results.gold_sql: SELECT campaigns.channel, SUM(orders.amount) AS revenue FROM orders JOIN order_campaigns ON order_campaigns.order_id = orders.id JOIN campaigns ON order_campaigns.campaign_id = campaigns.id GROUP BY campaigns.channel
results.final_sql: SELECT campaigns.channel, SUM(orders.amount) AS revenue FROM campaigns JOIN order_campaigns ON campaigns.id = order_campaigns.campaign_id JOIN orders ON order_campaigns.order_id = orders.id GROUP BY campaigns.channel

results.query: Show open billed amount by product category
results.gold_sql: SELECT products.category, SUM(invoice_lines.amount) AS billed_amount FROM invoices JOIN invoice_lines ON invoice_lines.invoice_id = invoices.id JOIN products ON invoice_lines.product_id = products.id WHERE invoices.status = 'open' GROUP BY products.category
results.final_sql: SELECT products.category, SUM(invoice_lines.amount) AS billed_amount FROM products JOIN invoice_lines ON products.id = invoice_lines.product_id JOIN invoices ON invoice_lines.invoice_id = invoices.id WHERE invoices.status = 'open' GROUP BY products.category

results.query: Show active subscription MRR by customer region
results.gold_sql: SELECT regions.name, SUM(subscriptions.monthly_amount) AS mrr FROM subscriptions JOIN customers ON subscriptions.customer_id = customers.id JOIN regions ON customers.region_id = regions.id WHERE subscriptions.status = 'active' GROUP BY regions.name
results.final_sql: SELECT regions.name, SUM(subscriptions.monthly_amount) AS mrr FROM customers JOIN subscriptions ON customers.id = subscriptions.customer_id JOIN regions ON customers.region_id = regions.id WHERE subscriptions.status = 'active' GROUP BY regions.name

results.query: Show open support tickets by customer segment
results.gold_sql: SELECT customer_segments.name, COUNT(support_tickets.id) AS tickets FROM support_tickets JOIN customers ON support_tickets.customer_id = customers.id JOIN segment_members ON segment_members.customer_id = customers.id JOIN customer_segments ON segment_members.segment_id = customer_segments.id WHERE support_tickets.status = 'open' GROUP BY customer_segments.name
results.final_sql: SELECT customer_segments.name, COUNT(support_tickets.id) AS tickets FROM support_tickets JOIN ticket_events ON support_tickets.id = ticket_events.ticket_id JOIN customers ON support_tickets.customer_id = customers.id JOIN segment_members ON customers.id = segment_members.customer_id JOIN customer_segments ON segment_members.segment_id = customer_segments.id WHERE support_tickets.status = 'open' GROUP BY customer_segments.name
